display_text: Tiny Aghanim's Scepter: Tree Volley — This upgrade transforms Tiny into a long-range artillery unit, countering high-ground defense and area denial by channeling continuous tree throws. It forces enemies to reposition constantly or risk being overwhelmed by sustained damage in team fights.
search_text: Tiny Aghanim Scepter Tree Volley high-ground defense area denial sustained damage artillery role change

display_text: Tiny Aghanim's Shard: Increases Tree Throw damage — This upgrade enhances Tiny's burst potential in skirmishes, countering squishy heroes and reinforcing his role as a mid-game tempo controller who can quickly eliminate key targets with amplified tree damage.
search_text: Tiny Aghanim Shard Tree Throw burst damage squishy heroes tempo control mid-game power spike
